title: FoliaPerms
description: A plugin that adds a permission handler to multi-threaded Folia servers, since the lack of permission plugins in Folia!
body:
![foliaperms banner :/](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb268a532c4cb3976c2767fb0e96cd8383134835.jpeg)

### WARNING!
There is a very similar plugin named FoliaPerm which has a very similar name and very similar functions but mine has an extra S at the end. If you find a plugin named FoliaPerm, it is NOT this plugin! We are not the same exact plugin!

My plugins owned by me will only be found on Modrinth and/or GitHub publicly online.

## FoliaPerms!
**FoliaPerms** is a plugin that is a simple permission handler for Folia, since LuckPerms does not have official support for Folia yet. FoliaPerms is an alternative of LuckPerms but way more simple and lightweight and minimum configuration! This is also one of the first permission systems for Folia ever released!

It gives you a lightweight permission system, which you can access by using a command called ```/fperm``` to give yourself or someone else the permissions, remove those permissions orcheck for existing permissions. If you need an permissions system for your Folia server, use FoliaPerms!

FoliaPerms will not get a Bukkit (Spigot/Paper/Purpur) version because this was made specifically for Folia servers AND my Folia version of my plugin [Axior](https://modrinth.com/plugin/axior).

### Integrations and dependencies
FoliaPerms does not have any dependencies or integrations, but for your plugin, if it requires FoliaPerms, it has to be in the plugins folder to access FoliaPerms' API class.

### License
FoliaPerms is created by KaiakK, this project is licensed under **MIT**.

**Thanks for 1,000 downloads!**
